programs.title: Executive Leadership in Peace & Dialogue
programs.description: An intensive program for senior practitioners and policymakers. Focus on strategic leadership, high-level mediation, and designing peace initiatives at scale.

programs.title: Youth Peace Fellowship
programs.description: For emerging leaders under 35. Combines residential workshops, mentorship, and project-based learning to build practical skills in dialogue and community engagement.

programs.title: Mediation & Negotiation Intensive
programs.description: Hands-on training in mediation and negotiation techniques. Suitable for diplomats, NGO staff, and professionals working in conflict-affected contexts.

programs.title: Women in Peace & Security
programs.description: Designed to strengthen the role of women in peace processes. Covers WPS frameworks, advocacy, and leadership in multilateral and community settings.
